# StretchLab Now Offers Access to Hundreds of Studios Nationwide!
Path Stroke 1
[ ![StretchLab Now Offers Access to Hundreds of Studios Nationwide!](https://blog.stretchlab.com/hubfs/email-header-v1-1.jpg) ](https://blog.stretchlab.com/hubfs/email-header-v1-1.jpg)
Posted Nov 16, 2025
Share: [ ](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.stretchlab.com%2Fstretchlab-now-offers-all-access-nationwide&t=StretchLab+Now+Offers+Access+to+Hundreds+of+Studios+Nationwide%21&amp_device_id=y1X1V8QsRMi9BtqnxfDLQl "Share to Facebook") [ ](https://twitter.com/share?text=StretchLab+Now+Offers+Access+to+Hundreds+of+Studios+Nationwide%21&url=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.stretchlab.com%2Fstretchlab-now-offers-all-access-nationwide&amp_device_id=y1X1V8QsRMi9BtqnxfDLQl "Share to Twitter")
* * *
StretchLab, the largest assisted stretching brand in the United States, has launched All Access across their studios. One membership, hundreds of studios. This means all existing and new StretchLab members can now access hundreds of participating StretchLab studios across the nation with any recurring membership! 
More studios means more flexibility. With the launch of All Access, StretchLab members don’t have to sacrifice their mobility. StretchLab is committed to keeping you flexible, so we’re making sure our access can be just as flexible for you. Members can still receive customized, expert-led stretch sessions, complimentary mobility assessments, and top-of-the-line [recovery tools](https://www.stretchlab.com/normatec?amp_device_id=y1X1V8QsRMi9BtqnxfDLQl), no matter what studio they choose to visit. 
Founded in 2015, StretchLab was created to help people through [customized flexibility services](https://www.stretchlab.com/stretches?amp_device_id=y1X1V8QsRMi9BtqnxfDLQl). StretchLab offers one-on-one assisted stretching to customers across a broad range of ages, lifestyles, and fitness levels. All StretchLab stretch practitioners, known as Flexologists, hold a nationally recognized certificate in assisted stretching, accredited by the Institute for Credentialing Excellence. Every studio offers adaptable stretch programs customized to each individual’s unique needs and goals. All memberships include access to [proprietary 3D technology](https://www.stretchlab.com/maps?amp_device_id=y1X1V8QsRMi9BtqnxfDLQl), video on-demand stretch content, and premium recovery tools. With just one membership, members can expect the same great service, expertise, technology, and experience no matter where they go.
The addition of All Access complements StretchLab’s mission to provide high quality assisted stretching services to clients of all types by making better flexibility and mobility more accessible. 
StretchLab is ready to be your recovery destination. No matter where life takes you, trust that our experts are ready to support your mobility goals. 
Not yet a StretchLab member? Get started today with up to 50% off your first stretch at any studio near you!
[Try StretchLab Today](https://lp.stretchlab.com/offer?offer_id=all-access-intro&clubready_referraltypeid=165007&amp_device_id=y1X1V8QsRMi9BtqnxfDLQl)
_All Access available only for recurring memberships._
_Premium studios excluded from All Access. See the full list of Premium studios[here](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers?amp_device_id=y1X1V8QsRMi9BtqnxfDLQl)._
